metadata.extraction_policy: manufacturer PDF only; no inferred shade names where not printed; uncertain OCR/table parses flagged parsed_review_required
metadata.notes: Aveda Full Spectrum expanded with natural bases, light/dark pure tones, pure pigments, pastel tones, customization matrices, vibrancy guide, Universal ØN guide, color balancing, and precoloration rules.

shades.shade_name: virtually colorless base for intensifying red shades
high-lift base for extra lift pastel blondes
very light blonde intense copper blonde

technical_rules.product_line: Color Rhapsody High Lift Permanent Cream Color

rule_condition.line: Color Rhapsody High Lift Permanent Cream Color

technical_rules.product_line: Color Rhapsody Ultimates Permanent Cream Color

rule_condition.line: Color Rhapsody Ultimates Permanent Cream Color

technical_rules.product_line: Color Fusion Advanced Performance Color Cream
Cover Fusion Low Ammonia Color Cream

rule_action.warning: Mixing outside the range can cause unpredictable results

rule_action.developer: Shades EQ Processing Solution or Gloss to Gel Processing Solution

rule_condition.formula_component_model: natural shade + intense base + pure tone or red pure pigment

rule_action.levels_7_to_10_warning: pure pigments are not recommended for natural-looking results because dye concentration is high
rule_action.natural_series_levels_3_to_6_add_tonalit: replace pure tones with pure pigments at up to double amount recommended for level
rule_action.natural_series_levels_3_to_6_intensify: use pure tone at recommended amount and add up to equal amount of pure pigment

rule_condition.condition: desired shade is 3 or more levels darker than previously colored hair

rule_action.recolor_after: apply desired Full Spectrum Permanent shade with 20 volume developer for 30 minutes
rule_action.use_product: Full Spectrum Deposit-Only Color Treatment + Universal ØN
